dashboard.label: SOC - Win10 Overview
dashboard.description: Windows 10 SOC overview: auth, Sysmon, processes, network, and PowerShell hunting.

search.query: index=win10 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats count as total_events
index=win10 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats dc(host) as hosts
index=win10 sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4625 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats count as failed_logons
index=win10 sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4624 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats count as success_logons
index=win10 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | timechart span=15m count
index=win10 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats count by sourcetype | sort -count | head 10

index=win10 sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4625 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | eval src=coalesce(Source_Network_Address, IpAddress, src_ip, "unknown") | stats count as fails by src | sort -fails | head 10

index=win10 sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4624 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | eval user=coalesce(Account_Name, TargetUserName, user, "unknown") | stats count as logons by user | sort -logons | head 10
index=win10 sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | stats count as executions by Image | sort -executions | head 10

index=win10 sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=3 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | eval dest=coalesce(DestinationIp, dest_ip, DestinationIP, "unknown") | stats count as connections by dest | sort -connections | head 10

index=win10 earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ ((sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1) OR (sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4688)) (powershell OR pwsh) | table _time host User Account_Name Image New_Process_Name CommandLine Process_Command_Line ParentImage Parent_Process_Name | sort - _time | head 50
